title: OCI Object Storage Bucket Made Public
description: Detects when a bucket's visibility is set to public.
query: 'Log Source' = 'OCI Audit Logs' and (('Event Type' = 'com.oraclecloud.objectstorage.updatebucket' and 'Original Log Content' like '*"publicAccessType":"ObjectRead"*'))
falsepositives: Routine storage operations by authorized administrators
